prompt: Help me create an MCP server that lets Claude query my PostgreSQL database. I want Claude to be able to list tables, describe schemas, and run read-only SELECT queries.
assertions: Response defines or names at least 3 distinct tools (e.g. list_tables, describe_table, execute_query or similar)
Response addresses read-only safety — blocking or validating against non-SELECT statements (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP)
Response uses an environment variable for the database connection string (DATABASE_URL or similar)
Response includes error handling with actionable messages for bad queries or connection failures
Response mentions the @modelcontextprotocol/sdk package or MCP SDK
